notices.agenda_text:
CITY OF SARATOGA SPRINGS CITY COUNCIL WORKSHOP AGENDA
April 22, 2026 - 2:00 p.m.
St. George City Hall
61 S. Main St., St. George, UT 84770

WORKSHOP MEETING


1.	Welcome
2.	Future Studies and Projects 
3.	Capital Project Updates
4.	ULA - Inlet Park Master Planning Cont. from 4-14-26 CC Meeting
5.	City Goal Update
6.	Topics for Future Policies and Discussions 

Adjournment

notices.title: Notice of Ordinance
notices.agenda_text:
NOTICE OF ADOPTION OF ORDINANCE

Notice is hereby given that the City Council of the City of Saratoga Springs, Utah, at their meeting of April 14, 2026, passed and adopted the following Ordinances:

-	Ordinance 26-13 (04-14-26) Amending the Map of Fireworks Restrictions within the City of Saratoga Springs, Utah.
-	Ordinance 26-14 (04-14-26) Adopting the 2026 Water Conservation Plan.
-	Ordinance 26-16 (04-14-26) Adopting Amendments to Title 19 - Land Development Code, of the City of Saratoga Springs. 

Copies of these Ordinances are on file in the office of the City of Saratoga Springs City Recorder and are available for review during business hours.
notices.meeting_location: 319 So. Saratoga Road Saratoga Springs, UT 84045 Show in Apple Maps Show in Google Maps

notices.title: City Council Meeting
notices.agenda_text:
AGENDA - City Council Meeting          - Amended Amd.
				CITY OF SARATOGA SPRINGS
Tuesday, April 14, 2026 @ 6:00 pm
City of Saratoga Springs Council Chambers
319 South Saratoga Road, Saratoga Springs, UT 84045

POLICY MEETING

CALL TO ORDER

1.	Roll Call. 
2.	Moment of Reflection. 
3.	Pledge of Allegiance. 
4.	Public Input - This time has been set aside for the public to express ideas, concerns, and comments for subject matter not listed as public hearing on the agenda. Limit of 3 minutes per speaker, unused time may not be given to another. Time for Public Input is limited to no more than 15 minutes total. 

REPORTS

1.	Mayor.
2.	City Council.
3.	Administration.
4.	Department Reports: Library, Recreation, Public Relations/Community Outreach.

CONSENT ITEMS
	The Council may approve these items without discussion or public comment and may remove an item to the Business Items for discussion and consideration.

1.	Fireworks Restriction Map Update. Ordinance 26-13 (04-14-26).
2.	Approval of Minutes: March 24, 2026 & March 31, 2026.

PUBLIC HEARINGS
	The Council will accept public comment and may approve the following items:

1.	Updates to the City of Saratoga Springs' Water Conservation Plan. Ordinance 26-14 (04-14-26).

BUSINESS ITEMS
	The Council will discuss (without public comment) and may approve the following items:

1.	Tentative Budget Presentation, FY 2026-27 Balanced Budget Report, and Summary of Budget Requests for FY 2026-27, including proposed tax rate increase to fund public safety.
2.	Award of Contract for Construction for the Saratoga Road and Pony Express Widening Project with Geneva Rock. Resolution R26-17 (04-14-26).
3.	Reimbursement Agreement for Meadows at North Lake with Alpine Homes LLC. Resolution R26-18 (04-14-26).
4.	Reimbursement Agreement for Fox Hollow Neighborhood 4 with Grnobl Fox Hollow Owner, LLC. Resolution R26-19 (04-14-26).
5.	North Marina Site Plan, located at 1192 E Saratoga Road. City initiated.
6.	Amendments to Title 19 Land Development Code of the City of Saratoga Springs, chapter 19.19 Open Space, for minimum required amenities. Citywide, City initiated.  Ordinance 26-15 (04-14-26).
7.	Amendments to Title 19 Land Development Code of the City of Saratoga Springs, chapter 19.16 Site and Architectural Design Standards, for warehouse additional standards exemption. City initiated, citywide. Ordinance 26-16 (04-14-26).
8.	Amendments to Title 19 Land Development Code of the City of Saratoga Springs, Chapter 19.16 Site and Architectural Design Standards, for building buffer requirements; and 19.02 Definition of Loading Bay. Citywide, City initiated. Ordinance 26-17 (04-14-26).

WORK SESSION

1.	Utah Lake Authority - Utah Lake Access Point Master Plans Project, Sam Braegger, Deputy Director.

CLOSED MEETING
	Possible motion to enter into closed meeting for the purchase, exchange, or lease of property; pending or reasonably imminent litigation; the character, professional competence, or the physical or mental health of an individual; or the deployment of security personnel, devices, or systems.

ADJOURNMENT

notices.title: Public Hearing: Water Conservation Plan Update
notices.agenda_text:
Notice of Public Hearing

The City of Saratoga Springs, Utah, proposes an update to the Water Conservation Plan ('Plan') pursuant to Utah Code Section 73-10-32. 

The City Council will hold a public hearing during its regular meeting on April 14th, 2026, beginning at 6:00 p.m. Held in the City Council Chambers at 319 S. Saratoga Road, Saratoga Springs UT, 84045, to discuss the proposed update to the Plan. 

Comments & questions about the Plan may be directed to the Public Works Dept. 801-766-6506. 

Comments may be submitted to comments@saratogasprings-ut.com.
notices.meeting_location: 319 So. Saratoga Road Saratoga Springs, UT 84045 Show in Apple Maps Show in Google Maps

notices.title: Notice of Quorum
notices.agenda_text:
NOTICE OF POSSIBLE QUORUM

Notice is given that a quorum of Saratoga Springs City Council Members may be present at a social gathering for elected leaders with neighboring cities at Cedar Fort Town, Utah, 
on Tuesday, March 31, 2026, 6:00 p.m.

No action will be taken at this gathering.

notices.title: Notice of Ordinance
notices.agenda_text:
NOTICE OF ADOPTION OF ORDINANCE

Notice is hereby given that the City Council of the City of Saratoga Springs, Utah, at their meeting of March 24, 2026, passed and adopted the following Ordinances:

-	Ordinance 26-10 (03-24-26) Amending Title 19 of the Saratoga Springs City Code regarding Auto Repair and Car Wash standards.
-	Ordinance 26-11 (03-24-26) Amending Title 19 of the Saratoga Springs City Code regarding City-owned office trailers. 
-	Ordinance 26-12 (03-24-26) Adopting an amendment to the Land Use map of the General Plan and adopting an amendment to the Official Zoning map, and approving a Development Agreement.

Copies of these Ordinances are on file in the office of the City of Saratoga Springs City Recorder and are available for review during business hours.



This notice has been posted on:
The Utah Public Notice Website,
The City of Saratoga Springs Website, and
The City of Saratoga Springs administration building notice board.



Dated: March 25, 2026
/s/ Nicolette Fike, City Recorder

notices.title: City Council Meeting
notices.agenda_text:
CITY COUNCIL AGENDA CITY OF SARATOGA SPRINGS
Tuesday, March 24, 2026 @ 6:00 pm
City of Saratoga Springs Council Chambers
319 South Saratoga Road, Saratoga Springs, UT 84045

POLICY MEETING

CALL TO ORDER

1.	Roll Call. 
2.	Moment of Reflection. 
3.	Pledge of Allegiance. 
4.	Presentation: Miss Saratoga Springs Royalty.
5.	Proclamation: Westlake High School Boys Basketball Day.
6.	Report: Valley Crossroads Chamber of Commerce Report. 
7.	Public Input - This time has been set aside for the public to express ideas, concerns, and comments for subject matter not listed as public hearing on the agenda. Limit of 3 minutes per speaker, unused time may not be given to another. Time for Public Input is limited to no more than 15 minutes total. 

REPORTS

1.	Mayor.
2.	City Council.
3.	Administration.

CONSENT ITEMS
	The Council may approve these items without discussion or public comment and may remove an item to the Business Items for discussion and consideration.

1.	Change orders 1 - 8 for the Lakeshore Trail, Amanda Lane segment project with MC Contractors. 
Resolution R26-15 (03-24-26). 
2.	Award of Contract for the Saratoga Springs Pony Express Parkway Completion Project with CMT Technical Services. Resolution R26-16 (03-24-26).
3.	Approval of Minutes: March 03, 2026.

BUSINESS ITEMS
	The Council will discuss (without public comment) and may approve the following items:

1.	ASD High School 722 General Plan Amendment from Planned Community and Low Density Residential to Institutional/Civic, Rezone from Planned Community and Agricultural to Institutional/Civic, and Development Agreement, with concept plan. Located approximately at the northwest corner of Ensign Drive and Mountain View Corridor. Frank Pulley of Alpine School District as applicant. Ordinance 26-12 (03-24-26).
2.	Preliminary Plat and Site plan for ASD High School 722. Located approximately at the Northwest corner of Ensign Drive and Mountain View Corridor. Frank Pulley, Alpine School District as applicant.
3.	Amendments to Title 19 Land Development Code of the City of Saratoga Springs, chapters 19.02, 19.04, & 19.05 regarding Auto Repair and Car Wash Standards. City Initiated, Citywide. Ordinance 26-10 (03-24-26).
4.	Amendments to Title 19 Land Development Code of the City of Saratoga Springs, chapters 19.02 & 19.05 regarding city-owned office trailers. City Initiated, Citywide. Ordinance 26-11 (03-24-26).

CLOSED MEETING
	Possible motion to enter into closed meeting for the purchase, exchange, or lease of property; pending or reasonably imminent litigation; the character, professional competence, or the physical or mental health of an individual; or the deployment of security personnel, devices, or systems.

ADJOURNMENT

notices.title: Notice of Ordinance
notices.agenda_text:
NOTICE OF ADOPTION OF ORDINANCE

Notice is hereby given that the City Council of the City of Saratoga Springs, Utah, at their meeting of March 3, 2026, passed and adopted the following Ordinances:

-	Ordinance 26-06 (03-03-26) Amending the Development Agreement for the Canyon Hollow Development.
-	Ordinance 26-08 (03-03-26) Amending Title 19 of the Saratoga Springs City Code regarding Home Occupations. 
-	Ordinance 26-09 (03-03-26) Adopting Amendments to the Trails Element of the General Plan.

Copies of these Ordinances are on file in the office of the City of Saratoga Springs City Recorder and are available for review during business hours.

notices.title: City Council Meeting
notices.agenda_text:
AGENDA - City Council Meeting

CITY OF SARATOGA SPRINGS
Tuesday, March 3, 2026 @ 6:00 pm
City of Saratoga Springs Council Chambers
319 South Saratoga Road, Saratoga Springs, UT 84045
POLICY MEETING
CALL TO ORDER
1. Roll Call.
2. Moment of Reflection.
3. Pledge of Allegiance.
4. Public Input - This time has been set aside for the public to express ideas, concerns, and comments for subject matter not listed as public hearing on the agenda. Limit of 3 minutes per speaker, unused time may not be given to another. Time for Public Input is limited to no more than 15 minutes total.
REPORTS
1. Mayor.
2. City Council.
3. Administration.
4. Department Reports: Public Works/Engineering, Finance.
CONSENT ITEMS
The Council may approve these items without discussion or public comment and may remove an item to the Business Items for discussion and consideration.
1. Award of Contract for 2026 Saratoga Springs Pavement Maintenance Projects to Asphalt Preservation for Bid Schedule A, and to Morgan Pavement Maintenance for Bid Schedule B. Resolution R26-11 (03-03-26).
2. Appointment of Owen Jackson to the North Utah Valley Animal Services Special Service District Board. Resolution R26-12 (03-03-26).
3. Approval of Minutes: February 17, 2026; February 21, 2026.
BUSINESS ITEMS
The Council will discuss (without public comment) and may approve the following items:
1. Award of Proposal for Architectural Services for design and construction of City of Saratoga Springs Fire Station, and authorization for staff to negotiate and enter into a contract with the selected party. Resolution R26-13 (03-03-26).
2. Award of Proposal for Construction Manager/General Contractor services on construction for City of Saratoga Springs Fire Station, and authorization for staff to negotiate and enter into a contract with the selected party. Resolution R26-14 (03-03-26).
3. Canyon Hollow Development Agreement amendment, located at 1498 N. Summer Village Rd. Ordinance 26-06 (03-03-26).
4. Amendments to Title 19.09 Land Development Code of the City of Saratoga Springs, Chapter 19.09 - Off-Street Parking Requirements. Ordinance 26-07 (03-03-26).
5. Amendments to Title 19 Land Development Code of the City of Saratoga Springs, Chapter 19.08 - Home Occupations, and 19.02 - Definitions. Ordinance 26-08 (03-03-26).
6. Trails Master Plan Amendment, City initiated, citywide. Ordinance 26-09 (03-03-26).
CLOSED MEETING
Possible motion to enter into closed meeting for the purchase, exchange, or lease of property; pending or reasonably imminent litigation; the character, professional competence, or the physical or mental health of an individual; or the deployment of security personnel, devices, or systems.
ADJOURNMENT
